$comment: Generated deterministically from UCF adapter conformance kit 1.0.0 models; do not edit by hand. Cross-record identities, report disposition, strict JSON, and executable wire behavior remain runtime checks.
description: Closed schema for the UCF adapter conformance manifest, ordered wire fixtures, deterministic result report, and content-addressed distribution index.
title: UCF adapter conformance kit 1.0.0 documents
